config.script:
'---------------------- 'otwórz/zamknij stronę '---------------------- function fopen() fopen=true end function
function fback() page_.result = vbCancel page_.goback() fback = true end function
'----------------------------- 'ustawia tytul strony raportu '----------------------------- sub page_title() dim pTitle set pTitle = page_.ctrl(ID_TITLE) pTitle.text = "" pTitle.fontsize = 5 page_.topelement.title = "Raport potwierdzenia - uzgadnianie transakcji" end sub
'-------------------------------------- 'dodaje odpowiednie przyciski na strone '-------------------------------------- sub page_buttons dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_BUTTONS)).removeall tab.newrow tab.newcell page_add_button tab, "Utwórz operacje", vbOK page_add_button tab, "Anuluj", vbCancel end sub
sub page_add_button(byref tab, byval strName, byval nOption) dim pNewHli set pNewHli = doc_.createhli() pNewHli.prop(GVAR_FUNCTIONHLI) = "page_click" pNewHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) = CLng(nOption)
tab.addctrl CTRL_TYPE_BUTTON,-1 tab.cell.keepline = true tab.cell.align = ALIGN_RIGHT set tab.element.hli = pNewHli with tab.element .text = strName .size = 12 .styleitem = STYLE_BUTTON end with end sub
'---------------------- 'naciśnięcie na klawisz '---------------------- sub page_click(byref pHli) page_.result=pHli.prop(GVAR_MODALRES) page_.goback end sub
'------------------- 'buduj potwierdzenie '------------------- function buildPotw(byref oRS) dim pPerf : set pPerf = doc_.performing("Trwa generowanie raportu potwierdzenia...")
'nagłówek potwierdzenia page_title
'buduj raport page_pozycje oRS
'przyciski page_buttons set pPerf = nothing
buildPotw = page_.domodalauto()
end function
'--------------- 'wypisz pozycje '--------------- sub page_pozycje(byref oRS) dim tab : set tab = doc_.afc.new_tb(page_).attach(page_.ctrl(ID_TAB_POS)).removeall
tab.newrow tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_TABLE_HEADER tab.newcell.addtext "Lp" tab.cell.width = CLng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) tab.newcell.addtext "Symbol" tab.cell.width = CLng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) tab.newcell.addtext "Transakcja" tab.newcell.addtext "Saldo z dekretów" tab.cell.width = CLng(MINIMIZE_SIZE) tab.newcell.addtext "Saldo z transakcji" tab.cell.width = CLng(MINIMIZE_SIZE)
'wypisz pozycje dim iter: iter = 0 do while not oRS.EOF tab.newrow
if (iter + 1) mod 2 = 0 then tab.row.styleitem = STYLE_ROW_EVEN end if
'lp tab.newcell.addtext cstr(iter + 1) tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
dim strHLISymbol: strHLISymbol = doc_.afc.convert.Formatter("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5KONTO," + cstr(oRS("idKonto")) + ",USAGE_VIEW)").done() tab.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRS("symbol")),doc_.createhlistr(strHLISymbol) tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
dim strHLITrans: strHLITrans = doc_.afc.convert.Formatter("OPEN_FORM_PROXY_HLI_USAGE(TYPEID_N5TRANSAKCJA," + cstr(oRS("idTrans")) + ",USAGE_VIEW)").done() tab.newcell.addtexthli cstr(oRS("symbol_trans")),doc_.createhlistr(strHLITrans) tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
tab.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(oRS("saldo_dekret"),"")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
tab.newcell.addtext(doc_.afc.display.money(oRS("saldo_trans"),"")).cell.align=ALIGN_RIGHT tab.element.fontsize = 3 tab.element.fontname = "Verdana" tab.element.forecolor = RGB(0,0,0)
iter = iter + 1 oRS.movenext loop end sub
